title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents fail because error compounding across multi-step workflows is normalized in the industry, even at high per-step accuracy. He advocates for building agents with genuine reliability and emphasizes that taste in design matters more than raw performance in the LLM era.
